opening_summary: This week, Groww's users have expressed dissatisfaction with the app's customer support, trading experience, and functionality. The top themes that have emerged are Poor Customer Support and Trading Experience, App Functionality and Performance Issues, and High Charges and Fees.

top_themes.theme_name: Poor Customer Support and Trading Experience
top_themes.summary: Customers are experiencing difficulties with the app's customer support and trading experience, citing unresponsive and unhelpful service, orders not being executed, and app freezing.
Users are experiencing technical issues with the app, including glitches, slow performance, and difficulties with logging in and withdrawing money.
Users are unhappy with the high charges and fees imposed by Groww.

user_quotes.quote: from past 1week am observing hung, due to this delay/hung am not able to buy/sell accurately.
user_quotes.theme_name: Poor Customer Support and Trading Experience

user_quotes.quote: lways mcx issues app don’t have own system like ZERODHA u lose money if u stuck in partition issue
f&o charges very high and sometimes it's hang at the time of order placed poor app

action_ideas.action: Improve customer support by increasing the number of support agents and providing 24/7 support.
action_ideas.linked_theme: Poor Customer Support and Trading Experience

action_ideas.action: Conduct regular app updates and maintenance to fix technical issues and improve performance.
Review and adjust the charging structure and fees to make them more competitive and transparent.

coverage_note: App Store public coverage did not reach the full requested lookback window. The stored snapshot contains the newest publicly reachable reviews only.
